text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Here's my thoughts. 
There are two kinds of people in this world.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Those who understand when to swallow 
dried squid, and those who don't.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And all said, I'm the latter… 
Chew as I want, it's too hard to 
get that "now!" feeling.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
…Ah, your expression tells me 
you suffer the same issue.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Then let's forge them together…… 
A pair of jaws as strong as the Giant Squid's!
